name: privychat
description: PrivyChat - aplicativo mobile first de chat privado em tempo real.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.render:frontend:build: npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
